detail.description:
Sword x Staff is a one-of-a-kind RPG — a “Third Way RPG.”
Strategy, massive world exploration, idle—why pick one when you can have it all?
Go hardcore, or just vibe—either way, you’ll find your own kind of fun here. The kind that actually feels different.
No pressure, no one way to play—just jump in, explore, and let the adventure click your way.
Curious what the gameplay is really like?
So, welcome to the unique world of Kanstein, and experience the one-of-a-kind Third Way adventure. Here, you
